_comment: Optional add-on work keyed by FINAL date. Placed only where it won't impair the day's main adaptation. Rendered as an 'Optional' block.

by_date._dow_rules: Generic by weekday if a specific date isn't listed; see build logic.
by_date.2026-06-15: Light core only (heavy day): Pallof press 3×10/side + dead bug 3×10. Skip if deadlifts felt maximal.
by_date.2026-06-16: Zone 2 cooldown: 10 min very easy row (~2:20+/500m), nasal breathing. Keep it truly easy — protect tomorrow's squat.
by_date.2026-06-18: Core + mobility (low-CNS day): hollow hold 3×30s, side plank 3×30s/side, 5 min hip/ankle mobility.
by_date.2026-06-19: Optional zone 2: 15-20 min easy row OR light posterior accessory (hamstring curls 3×12, band pull-aparts 3×15). Legs are fresh today.
by_date.2026-06-20: Mobility/stretch only after the long row: 10 min — hips, hamstrings, lats, thoracic. No added load.
by_date.2026-06-21: Already optional: dead bug 3×10 + bird dog 3×10/side, easy walk.

weekday_default.Mon: Light core only (heavy day): Pallof press 3×10/side + dead bug 3×10. Skip if the lift felt maximal.
weekday_default.Tue: Zone 2 cooldown: 10 min very easy row, nasal breathing. Keep it easy — protect the squat day.
weekday_default.Thu: Core + mobility: hollow hold 3×30s, side plank 3×30s/side, 5 min hip/ankle mobility.
weekday_default.Fri: Optional zone 2: 15-20 min easy row OR light posterior accessory (hamstring curls, band pull-aparts). Legs are fresh.
weekday_default.Sat: Mobility/stretch only: 10 min hips, hamstrings, lats, thoracic. No added load.
